sub_mechanisms: M_1: graded prompt encoding with weight-space grading
M_2: current-algebra-style current operator on prompt sequence
M_3: central-extension element as phase-drift tracker
M_4: phase-coherent decode using level-fixed modular projections
stripped_llm_application: Prompt sequence encoded with a weight-space grading; a current-operator parametrizes inter-token transitions, and a central element (loop-algebra level) tracks accumulated phase drift across the sequence. Decode uses level-fixed projections to recover phase-coherent output.
novelty_claim_stripped: No published LLM mechanism uses a current-algebra current operator + central-extension level for phase tracking.
